Product Details
Steering Gear Oil Seals

Dedicated shaft sealing solutions for steering assemblies that require stable fluid retention and long-term reliability.

← Back to Product Center

Industrial Product

Steering Gear Oil Seals

Used in steering systems where rotary sealing quality and contamination exclusion are both critical.

CHX Steering Gear Oil Seals are developed for vehicle steering positions that must maintain hydraulic fluid control, resist contamination ingress, and support long service intervals.

System Reliability

Supports stable sealing in steering assemblies that operate under vibration and variable temperature.

Leakage Prevention

Helps control fluid loss in precision steering components and connected housings.

Contamination Protection

The sealing profile can be selected to improve dirt resistance in road and workshop environments.
